Medication\nAdherence 85% Goal: 100% You took 85% of your medications this week. You missed only 2 evening doses. Symptoms\nOverview Mild fatigue reported more frequently on Wednesday and Saturday. AI Insights Try not to miss evening doses to maintain consistent levels. Symptoms increased this week; monitor fatigue levels closely tomorrow.
